standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-subchart-override/charts/subchart1/templates/values-display.yaml
subchart1-values: |
    config:
      enabled: true
      timeout: 30
    global:
      domain: example.com
      environment: development
      imageRegistry: docker.io
    name: subchart1-from-parent
    port: 8080
    replicas: 3
subchart1-global: |
    domain: example.com
    environment: development
    imageRegistry: docker.io
---
# Source: test-subchart-override/charts/subchart2/templates/values-display.yaml
subchart2-values: |
    database:
      host: localhost
      port: 5432
    global:
      domain: example.com
      environment: development
      imageRegistry: docker.io
    name: subchart2-from-parent
    port: 9090
subchart2-global: |
    domain: example.com
    environment: development
    imageRegistry: docker.io
---
# Source: test-subchart-override/templates/values-display.yaml
all-values: |
    global:
      domain: example.com
      environment: development
      imageRegistry: docker.io
    parentName: parent-chart
    parentVersion: 1.0.0
    subchart1:
      config:
        enabled: true
        timeout: 30
      global:
        domain: example.com
        environment: development
        imageRegistry: docker.io
      name: subchart1-from-parent
      port: 8080
      replicas: 3
    subchart2:
      database:
        host: localhost
        port: 5432
      global:
        domain: example.com
        environment: development
        imageRegistry: docker.io
      name: subchart2-from-parent
      port: 9090
